title: Patchouli Books
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fefd9ba3-1b46-4c4e-ae6c-077ae887934e.png)

**Welcome to Patchouli Books!** This is an add-on for the [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-rofl-edition) mod that adds various books for different mods, trying to document them as best as possible. Furthermore there are a few more QoL features I have in mind. This mod will only ever exist for 1.12.2 as I currently have no interest in doing anything on the newer versions of Minecraft. If you want to take a look at the things I encountered while working on this project, feel free to check out my [project notes](https://github.com/Ender-Development/PatchouliBooks/blob/master/NOTES.md). Furthermore I made none of the art this mods uses. All the art used is either from Patchouli or sourced from various repositories. I've compiled a list of all the sources [here](https://github.com/Ender-Development/PatchouliBooks/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/patchoulibooks/textures/sources.md) together with the original authors and their respective licenses.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c4a5466b-c8a9-4ecf-b6a9-f02cccdb90d6.png)

Stuff I have already implemented:

*   added HEI/JEI integration (you can now open JEI for every item rendered inside a book using the same keybind as for JEI)
*   improved JEI integration (relevant books will now show next to the recipe)
*   backported Pamphlets from the 1.18 version of Patchouli (needs to be enabled in the config)
*   backported [PatchouliButton](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchoulibutton) with a few more features
*   new Page Types (an iteration of most of the existing ones as well as a new custom one for PedestalCrafting/ExtendedCrafting)
*   of course a Patchouli Book explaining the features of this mod
*   [documentation](https://github.com/Ender-Development/PatchouliBooks/blob/master/README.md#documented-mods) for various mods (their respective books will only be loaded if the mod is present)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4b1c8185-25d6-41ec-8f07-378ffde9cf98.png)

Stuff I may work on in the future:

*   backporting [PatchouliQuests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-quests)
*   implement the "inventory-scanning-to-open-a-book-entry" thing from [Botania](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Botania/blob/1.12-final/src/main/java/vazkii/botania/client/core/handler/TooltipAdditionDisplayHandler.java)
*   add new page types (e.g. [Boss Info](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/patchouli-template-boss-info))  

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f91c380a-3d45-48a0-85a6-ba66c92d7ed1.png)

These mods are currently documented in this mod within their own books:

*   [Gendustry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gendustry)
*   [MoarBoats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moar-boats)
*   [Pressure Pipes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pressure-pipes)
*   [Thermal Logistics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermallogistics)

This list may seem a bit obscure as there aren't any big mods listed yet. This is because this project started with a few book I already made myself for my [own modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/zerblands-remastered) and these were already done before starting this. The list will most certainly grow in the future. Furthermore, I greatly appreciate any help with this project. If you're interested in helping me out, feel free to contact me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/JF7x2vG) or create an [issue](https://github.com/Ender-Development/PatchouliBooks/issues) on this repository.

[**![](https://files.readme.io/f10e57c-Diamond_Shaped3.png)**](https://www.akliz.net/enderman)
